onComponentTokens.notes: Tooltip text on filled tooltip bg; reads --brand-on-component so it follows role remap.
Optional thumb glyph; reads --brand-on-component (thumb is white-fill so this rarely renders but ships for completeness).

notes: Control-range archetype: track + fill + thumb with optional ticks, tooltip, and label rows. First member of a family that will later include range-dual + color-slider.
Variant pair is filled (solid value bar) + soft (container-tinted value bar). Thumb stays white with coloured border for both variants — keeps the handle visually distinct from the fill at all sizes.
Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap --brand-* palette vars. Both variants read --brand-* so role swap works for both filled fill and soft container-tinted fill.
Track (unfilled rail) is intentionally NEUTRAL (--surface-base-cm-outline-hover), never role-coloured — only the value range carries the role colour.
Halo is a Material-style hover ring around the thumb, sized ≈2× thumb-width per density. Halo opacity ships at 0.2 so it never competes with the thumb itself.
Ticks have a separate active/inactive split (--slider-tick-color vs --slider-tick-color-pressed) that follows the fill colour automatically.
